product_overview: ErpGreeHouse is a Telegram-integrated CRM with an Admin UI, JWT-based authentication, loyalty program, marketing and POS integrations, and analytics for business reporting. The system exposes a FastAPI backend (v1) consumed by a React admin interface and integrations.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT-based authentication with token refresh for the Admin UI and API consumers.
Enable full CRUD management of customers and products through REST endpoints for administration and POS integrations.
Deliver analytics, reporting and dashboard widgets for business insights with export capabilities.
Support a loyalty program (profile lookup and QR token generation) tightly integrated with customer records.
Expose marketing campaign and consent APIs for targeted campaigns and compliance.
Support POS sale creation and receipt retrieval to integrate order lifecycle with CRM and loyalty.

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Login, token refresh and session lifecycle for users (JWT-based), enabling role-based access for admin and API consumers.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access and refresh tokens (cookies and/or Bearer token)
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with Authorization: Bearer <refresh_token> -> Receive 200 TokenResponse with new access token
POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 InvalidCredentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides analytics and widget configuration data for the admin UI dashboard.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/dashboard/analytics with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 AnalyticsData
GET /api/v1/dashboard/widgets with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 WidgetConfig[]
GET /api/v1/dashboard/analytics without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: List, create and update customer accounts used across loyalty, marketing and POS systems.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Customer[]
POST /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {full_name, phone, notes} -> Receive 200 Customer
PUT /api/v1/customers/{id} with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {full_name, phone, notes} -> Receive 200 Customer
POST /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid body (missing phone) -> Receive 400 ValidationError
PUT /api/v1/customers/{nonexistent_id} with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {...} -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Manage product catalog and inventory entries used by admin UI and POS integration.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Product[]
POST /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {name, price, description} -> Receive 200 Product
POST /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid body (price as string) -> Receive 400 ValidationError

features.name: Analytics & Reporting
features.description: Provide analytics summary and export capabilities for reporting and business intelligence.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/analytics/summary with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 AnalyticsSummary
GET /api/v1/analytics/export with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 FileDownload
GET /api/v1/analytics/export with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> when export processing fails/timeout -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error with standard error response

features.name: Loyalty System
features.description: Customer loyalty profiles and QR-token generation used for points accrual and redemptions.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/loyalty/profile/{customer_id} with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 LoyaltyProfile
POST /api/v1/loyalty/qr-token with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {customer_id} -> Receive 200 QRTokenResponse
GET /api/v1/loyalty/profile/{unknown_customer_id} with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 404 NotFound
POST /api/v1/loyalty/qr-token with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {customer_id: unknown} -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: Marketing Integration
features.description: Manage campaigns and customer consent for marketing communications and segmentation.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
GET /api/v1/marketing/campaigns with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Campaign[]
POST /api/v1/marketing/consent with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {customer_id, consent_given: true} -> Receive 200 ConsentResponse
POST /api/v1/marketing/consent with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {customer_id: unknown, consent_given: true} -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: POS Integration
features.description: Create sales from POS and retrieve receipts; integrates sales with customers, products and loyalty.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token
POST /api/v1/pos/sale with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {customer_id, items: [...], total} -> Receive 200 SaleResponse
GET /api/v1/pos/receipts with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Receipt[]
POST /api/v1/pos/sale with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid body (missing items) -> Receive 400 ValidationError

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard with widgets and analytics

features.name: Loyalty System
features.description: Customer loyalty program with QR codes

known_limitations.impact: Cannot run tests locally without Docker

known_limitations.issue: Limited error handling in analytics export
known_limitations.impact: Large exports may timeout or fail silently

known_limitations.issue: QR token generation depends on customer ID sequence
known_limitations.impact: Potential token collisions in high-concurrency scenarios

known_limitations.issue: No input validation on some API endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Invalid data may be accepted without proper validation

known_limitations.issue: Frontend locale handling is hardcoded to English for E2E
